event: bulky RPLN metastasis invading third portion of duodenum
four cycles of BEP administered at previous hospital
start of fourth cycle of BEP delayed by 1 week
CT at 1 month after BEP completion
PET-CT at 1 month after BEP completion
referred to our hospital for further management
repeat PET-CT showed increasing 18F-FDG uptake in RPLN metastases
new uptake in right iliac lymph node metastases
no severe adverse effects during TIP
CT after two courses of TIP
RPLN metastasis did not respond to chemotherapy
CT showing dilated bowel loop with massive clot
direct extravasation of contrast from aorta into duodenum
control angiography showed minimal residual hemorrhage
massive bleeding recurred 18 days after first hemorrhage
septic shock due to graft infection
